ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for model training */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean Squared Error (MSE) metric */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared metric */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was executed */,
  "feature_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature set used */,
  "baseline_mse" REAL /* Baseline MSE for comparison */,
  "baseline_r_squared" REAL /* Baseline R-squared for comparison */,
  "feature_importance" TEXT /* JSON string containing feature importance scores */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON string containing hyperparameters used */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of model training in seconds */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "feature_count" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "size_in_mb" REAL /* Size of the dataset in megabytes */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the dataset */,
  "privacy_level" TEXT /* Privacy level of the dataset (e.g., public, confidential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Training status of the model (e.g., trained, untrained) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON string containing default hyperparameters */,
  "feature_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the default feature set used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing user permissions */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES model_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
